attributes.description: Authentication & account-management events. Successful logon (4624), failed logon (4625), logoff (4634/4647), explicit-creds logon (4648), special-privilege logon (4672 — admin-equivalent), account created (4720), added to group (4732), password reset (4724), account changed/disabled/locked (4738/4740/4767), RDP session reconnect/disconnect (4778/4779). Cross-reference with the Browser dashboard's downloads and the Shellbag's removable-media panel — a 2am 4624 followed by 2:30am downloads to a USB drive tells a complete story.

attributes.title: Event Log: Authentication & Account Management
